# Tables

```{r k-regions, echo = FALSE}
dat_cap <- paste(
  "Pacific Herring stock assessment regions (SARs) in British Columbia.",
  "Note that formal stock assessments are only done for the ", 
  number_to_word(regions %>% filter(Type == "Major") %>% nrow()),
  "major SARs."
)
dat <- regions %>%
  select(RegionName, Region, Type) %>%
  rename(Name = RegionName, Code = Region) %>%
  filter(Type %in% c("Major", "Minor"))
kable(x = dat, caption = dat_cap, booktabs = TRUE, longtable = FALSE) # %>%
  # kableExtra::row_spec(0, bold = TRUE)
```
